hero.title: We materialize your projects, we build your dreams
hero.subtitle: At Refcon, we turn your ideas into reality. We offer a comprehensive service in construction, renovations, and trades for homes and businesses, guaranteeing quality and trust in every detail.

services.title: Our Services of Excellence
services.subtitle: From a complete renovation to creating your ideal pool, our team of master craftsmen is ready to bring your vision to life.

about.title: Our Essence: 30 Years of Building Trust
about.description1: Since 1995, Refcon has been synonymous with a passion for well-done construction. With 30 years of experience, we merge the traditional craftsmanship that defines us with constant innovation to create spaces that are not only aesthetic but also functional and durable.
about.description2: Our commitment is based on total client satisfaction. That's why we get involved in every project as if it were our own, exceeding expectations and building long-term relationships of trust based on decades of work. At Refcon, every project is a work of art.

process.title: Our Work Method
process.subtitle: We accompany you in every phase of the project, ensuring a clear, fluid process without surprises.

step1.title: Vision and Consultation
step1.description: It all starts with listening to you. We understand your desires, needs, and budget to shape the initial idea.

step2.title: Design and Detailed Quote
step2.description: We develop a tailored action plan and a transparent budget, with no fine print, adjusted to your dreams.

step3.title: Execution and Mastery
step3.description: Our team of artisans and technicians executes the project with precision, superior quality, and rigorous supervision.

step4.title: Delivery and Satisfaction Guarantee
step4.description: We deliver your dream come true, ensuring your complete happiness and backing our work with a solid guarantee.

cta.title: See how easy it is? The first step is yours.
cta.subtitle: Start the journey to materialize your dream project.

projects.title: Projects That Inspire
projects.subtitle: A portfolio of our work. Dreams fulfilled for happy clients.

project8.title: Terrace with a View of the Sky

cta.title: Start Your Dream
cta.subtitle: Have a vision? We build it together.

testimonials.title: The Voice of Our Clients
testimonials.subtitle: We are proud of the legacy we build and the trust our clients place in us.
testimonials.testimonial2: We hired Refcon for a complete renovation and it was a 10/10 experience. The quality of the finishes is sublime, but what really impressed us was their punctuality and incredible attention to detail. They are true artisans. If you are looking for a company that loves what they do, look no further.
testimonials.testimonial3: The Refcon team transformed our old premises into a vibrant business. Their professionalism, constant communication, and ability to solve unforeseen issues with creativity was exceptional. They met deadlines and the budget perfectly. Highly recommended.

finalCta.title: Ready to build your dreams?
finalCta.subtitle: Let's talk. Contact us today for a no-obligation consultation and discover how we can help you materialize your vision.
finalCta.reviewLink: Rate our mastery, your opinion helps us grow!
